violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Open box of single use forks uncovered/exposed at bottom shelf below oven.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solutions were fresh but found on the light side of 200ppm. Solutions must be maintained at 200-400ppm Quat per label instructions.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Sanitizer spray bottle found with strong bleach solution (staff had thought it was from the Quat dispenser). -Simple green spray bottle is not labeled.
